chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-1685 of 2025 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1.For hearing of CMA No.8350/2025 2.For hearing of main case. 15.05.2025 Rana Sakhawat Ali, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr.Muhammad Akbar Khan, Assistant Attorney General. Ms.Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Mr.Muhammad Siddique, Advocate for Respondent. Learned counsel states that this petition is pressed to the extent that the respondents may be pleased to decide the application dated 14.04.2025 available at page 101. Learned counsel seeks that the application be decided by the respondents expeditiously, preferably within a period of 15 days and after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner. Learned counsel for the respondent has no cavil to the aforesaid and states that this petition may be disposed of in the said terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge nasir
